transcript: Hey everyone, thanks for joining me today and that was an amazing introduction, gave me a lot of energy. Um, today I'm here to talk about the largest perpetuals exchange on Solana, Drift, and uh what we're doing to build the Perp DEX of the future. A quick introduction on us, we started back in 2021, actually launched at the very first Breakpoint, uh back in Lisbon. We launched with a very simple dynamic virtual AMM. Uh, we've been around for a very long time. Uh 22, we launched our v2 which included new mechanisms to build the most optimal on-chain liquidity. In 2023, we launched borrow-lend markets, spot listings, as well as margin trading. In 2024, um we launched uh new pre-launch markets, Drift Earn, and new versions of structured products. So, um we basically went from a simple virtual AMM to an all-in-one DeFi suite in the last four years. And in 2025, we had a very special announcement come out last week, um which we're going to talk about in in a second. But before we get started into what Drift v3 is, um our thesis for what perps on Solana need to be is two things. They need to be fully on-chain, uh but they also need to be fully performant and trader centric. So we believe that the winning perps formula is going to be the exchange that gives traders the best experience that doesn't make them feel like they're doing an on-chain transaction. And that's exactly what Drift v3 is. Drift v3 launched just last week, has one goal. It is built to outperform. Built to outperform its v2 version, built to outperform other traders, and to give you the tools to do your very best. Drift v3 is high performant, has deep liquidity from day one, and is the only perps exchange with multi-collateral, allowing you to use your SOL, your staked SOL, uh and other beloved Solana assets as collateral. Let's give some quick stats on the massive improvements that Drift v3 has shipped to the market. Drift v3 is 10x faster, has 5x tighter take profit and stop loss, and gives you a 10x reduction in slippage for market orders. Can we please get a round of applause for the amazing work that Drift v3 has pushed to the market. And lastly, we also have gasless trading by default, which means you never have to press sign transaction again. And this is still fully on-chain but gives you exactly the experience that a centralized exchange offers. Give a quick run through on what we shipped too. One is a huge brand refresh, the biggest since we've launched. We've also launched professional P&L tracking where now you can see exactly how much money you've won or lost in a way clearer way. This is a GitHub-style calendar view on your portfolio and it it it illuminates your your trading um performance much clearer. We have frictionless onboarding where we have native Privy integrations as well as an integration with fun.xyz where you can deposit from any chain with no friction whatsoever. One click straight into your Drift account on Solana just like a centralized exchange. Um we have now a fully redesigned trader-centric terminal, new modern brand colors with uh with perfect tracking, very responsive and snappy UI, uh something you might have not experienced before on on previous perp DEXes. And we also have a lot more coming up. v3 has is now live, you can check it out on app.drift.trade. But beyond that, we're also excited to announce that we will be launching a mobile app in Q1 next year. The first of its kind multi-collateral native on Solana perp mobile app. Um will be launching on App Store as well as Solana Mobile. And we will also be launching a native liquidity provider called Drift Liquidity Provider, allowing you to have deeper liquidity and faster fills on Solana. Our roadmap for what's coming in 2026 is going to be even bigger. We're going to focus on bringing more liquidity on via Prop AMMs and a fully on-chain CLOB. And we're going to be we're going to be making some announcements on making Drift a fully owned by the community ownership token. So, want to end off today by saying that we've built Drift as a culmination of all of the knowledge that we've gained building perp exchanges since 2021. And uh a very simple outro which is Drift v3 is built to outperform. Please try out Drift today and uh let us know if you like it. Thank you very much.

sources.title: Introducing Hermes 4.3: Local Intelligence Globally Trained
sources.snippet:
Introducing Hermes 4.3: Local Intelligence Globally Trained - NOUS RESEARCH[Skip to content](#content)
[](#elementor-action:action=popup:open&settings=eyJpZCI6IjE3NjEiLCJ0b2dnbGUiOmZhbHNlfQ==)
Menu
# Introducing Hermes 4.3: Local Intelligence Globally Trained
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/435_b_s_2-scaled.jpg)
Today we’re releasing Hermes 4.3 ([🤗 Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B)), an update to our flagship Hermes series of models. Hermes 4.3 was trained with an extended context length (up to 512K) and nearly matches (and in some cases exceeds) the performance of Hermes 4 70B at half the parameter cost. Based on[Seed-OSS-36B-Base](https://huggingface.co/ByteDance-Seed/Seed-OSS-36B-Base), Hermes 4.3 is an excellent shape for consumer local inference or enterprise self-deployment. The[GGUFs](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B-GGUF)comfortably sit in the VRAM of off-the-shelf GPUs, offering a private, powerful, neutrally-aligned model to everyone.
Hermes 4.3 is our first production model post-trained entirely on the[Psyche](https://psyche.network/)network, our distributed training network that uses the DisTrO optimizer to efficiently communicate between training nodes spread out through data centers over the open internet and secured by the consensus of the Solana blockchain. By enabling nodes throughout the world to collaborate on a single training run, Psyche can dramatically reduce the cost of training frontier level models, leveling the playing field for open source AI model developers.
Although we’ve performed extensive scientific research on DisTrO and its implementation in Psyche, we decided to verify its effectiveness for production workloads by training Hermes 4.3 both on Psyche and via the traditional centralized approach. As outlined in the[Hermes 4 Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2508.18255), we used our[custom version of Torchitan](https://github.com/nousresearch/torchtitan/)to train Hermes 4.3 following the same recipe as Hermes 4 (FSDP+AdamW). We then trained the model a second time on Psyche (TP+DisTrO). Given the extended context length and increased training set size, the Hermes 4.3 training run was twice as large as Hermes 4.
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_12-scaled.png)
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_22-scaled.png)
The training run proved stable throughout, averaging 144k tokens/second spread across 24 Psyche nodes. Using DisTro’s overlapped collective strategy, the entirety of the P2P communications were hidden by the training time, effectively achieving equivalent throughput to traditional, centralized training. Under the hood, Psyche uses a dual L1-P2P networking model where consensus state is managed by a smart contract on the Solana blockchain while training gradients are communicated out-of-band through a custom mesh P2P network.
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_34_2-scaled.png)
**The Psyche trained version of Hermes 4.3 outperformed the traditional centralized version on a suite of downstream tasks**. Although previous runs had produced similar results, it was a confirming signal that Psyche is up to the task of training production models. Hermes 4.3 achieves SOTA on RefusalBench across all popular closed and open models in being helpful and aligned to the user’s values. For transparency we are publishing the full set of[evaluation responses and scorings](https://huggingface.co/datasets/NousResearch/eval-Hermes-4.3-36B). In addition we are releasing the centrally trained version ([🤗 Model](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B-centralized),[Evals](https://huggingface.co/datasets/NousResearch/eval-Hermes-4.3-36B-centralized)) as a research artifact (you’re welcome @xl8harder).
![](https://nousresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/43_52-scaled.png)
To learn more about Psyche, check out the[live dashboard](https://psyche.network/)

tags.impact_reason: Drift v3 brings significant performance improvements and new features to the Solana perpetuals trading ecosystem, potentially attracting more users and liquidity.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic, high-performance engine as the Semantic Anchor because the transcript repeatedly emphasizes that Drift v3 is 'built to outperform', is '10x faster', and functions as a new 'engine'. This metaphor directly captures the core concepts of speed, power, and precision engineering. For the homepage text, I integrated '10X' as a holographic readout on the engine casing. This is a direct reference to the '10x faster' performance metric mentioned in the text, making it a high-impact, diegetic element that reinforces the story's main point.
visual_idea.description: A sleek, vertically-oriented DeFi engine, crafted from polished obsidian and translucent crystalline materials, is suspended in a dark, minimalist space. Inside its core, vibrant Solana-purple and green plasma pulses through intricate pathways, symbolizing deep liquidity and high-speed transactions. Etched into a polished metal plate on the engine's side, the text '10X' glows with a soft, confident neon light. The background fades into a deep, out-of-focus architectural void, suggesting a vast digital hangar.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A sleek, vertically-oriented DeFi engine, crafted from polished obsidian and translucent crystalline materials, is suspended dramatically in a dark, minimalist space. Its monumental form extends upwards, emphasizing immense height with ample negative space above, conveying an epic scale. Inside its core, vibrant Solana-purple and electric green plasma pulses dynamically through intricate, illuminated pathways, symbolizing deep liquidity and high-speed transactions. Etched into a highly polished metallic plate on the engine's side, the text '10X' glows with a soft, confident neon light, casting subtle reflections on the obsidian. The background recedes into a deep, out-of-focus architectural void, hinting at a vast, shadowy digital hangar. The scene is lit with dramatic, cinematic volumetric lighting, creating striking light shafts and profound shadows that highlight the engine's contours and reflective surfaces. The overall aesthetic is hyperrealistic and photorealistic, with an 8K ultra-detailed quality, high dynamic range, and intense cinematic contrast. The rendering showcases intricate architectural details and glowing holographic data effects, enhanced by polished obsidian reflections and crystalline refractions. 3:4 aspect ratio, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, incredibly sharp focus, dramatic lighting.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic, high-performance engine as the Semantic Anchor because the transcript repeatedly emphasizes that Drift v3 is 'built to outperform', is '10x faster', and functions as a new 'engine'. This metaphor directly captures the core concepts of speed, power, and precision engineering. For the homepage text, I integrated '10X' as a holographic readout on the engine casing. This is a direct reference to the '10x faster' performance metric mentioned in the text, making it a high-impact, diegetic element that reinforces the story's main point.
visual_idea.description: A macro, top-down view into the heart of the Drift v3 engine. Polished obsidian panels frame a central crystalline conduit where a vortex of purple and green energy swirls intensely. Intricate micro-circuitry and data pathways are visible just beneath the translucent surface, glowing softly. The focus is on the raw, concentrated power and precision engineering at the core of the system.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, top-down view into the heart of the Drift v3 engine. Polished obsidian panels, deep and highly reflective, frame a central crystalline conduit. Within the conduit, a highly intense vortex of purple and green energy swirls with cinematic volumetric lighting, casting dramatic light and shadow. Intricate micro-circuitry and holographic data pathways are visible just beneath the translucent crystalline surface, glowing softly with cool, bright illumination and subtle holographic glow. The focus is on the raw, concentrated power and precision engineering at the core of the system, emphasizing symmetrical composition and tight macro framing that fills the 1:1 aspect ratio frame with rich texture and detail. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic volumetric lighting, high contrast.

editorial.headline: Drift Deploys v3 Engine, Confirms Native Mobile App for Q1
editorial.standfirst: Drift is closing the gap between CEX and DEX UX with gasless trading and cross-chain deposits. The protocol's v3 overhaul and upcoming mobile client signal a shift toward capturing mainstream institutional volume on Solana.
key_takeaways: v3 delivers 10x faster execution and 10x lower slippage on market orders compared to v2.
Native mobile app confirmed for Q1 2026 launch on App Store and Solana Mobile.
Integration with fun.xyz enables friction-free, cross-chain deposits directly into Solana accounts.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The narrative at Breakpoint 2025 is clear: Solana protocols are no longer competing just with each other, but with centralized incumbents. **Drift** has solidified this stance with the launch of its v3 engine, a complete architectural overhaul designed to eliminate the performance delta between on-chain and off-chain venues. By delivering **10x faster execution** and a **10x reduction in slippage** for market orders, Drift is effectively removing the latency penalties that have historically kept high-frequency and institutional capital on centralized exchanges.

Beyond raw performance, v3 attacks the user experience friction that plagues DeFi adoption. The introduction of default gasless trading removes the repetitive "sign transaction" fatigue, while the integration with **fun.xyz** abstracts away bridging complexities, allowing users to deposit assets from any chain directly into their Drift account. Coupled with a new **GitHub-style** P&L calendar view and multi-collateral support for **SOL** and staked SOL, the platform is optimizing for professional traders who demand granular performance tracking and capital efficiency.

Looking ahead, the most significant alpha lies in Drift's aggressive expansion into mobile. Confirmed for Q1 2026, the native app—launching on both the App Store and **Solana Mobile**—positions Drift to capture the retail flow that remains stickiest on centralized mobile interfaces. With a roadmap that includes a fully on-chain Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) and Proprietary AMMs later in 2026, Drift is systematically dismantling the moats of traditional finance, moving from a "virtual AMM" experiment to a full-stack institutional liquidity venue.
